title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Policy Object (polymorphic)
description: Polymorphic Studio PolicyObject schema covering all author-time PolicyObject kinds per studio-authoring/specs/policy-object-model.md and the composition table in CONCEPT-MODEL.md §6.1. Discriminated by `kind`. Carries the StudioMetadataEnvelope inline (id, workspaceId, version, citations[], provenance, originClass, lifecycleState, mappingState, etc.). Body shape is per-kind: WOS-projecting kinds (NoticeRequirement, AppealRight, ExplanationRequirement, Deadline, ActorMapping, EvidenceRequirement, Outcome, DecisionRule, ContinuationOfServicesRequirement, CounterfactualRequirement) project to WOS via `wosTarget` JSONPath; AppealRight + DecisionRule additionally compose `wos-workflow.schema.json#/$defs/AppealMechanism` and `#/$defs/DecisionTable` via $ref where the WOS shape is authoritative. Studio-only kinds (PolicySource, AuthorityRank, ApplicabilityScope, EffectivePeriod, Supersession, Conflict, Assumption, OpenQuestion, ProtectedCategory) define body shapes inline. Deontic kinds (Requirement, Obligation, Permission, Prohibition, Right, Condition, ExceptionRule, DataElement) carry `defeasible: boolean` for OASIS LegalRuleML interop. Stage-3 enforces envelope + kind discriminator strictly; per-kind body shapes are loosely validated (flexible body with documented field expectations); deeper per-field validation lives in Stage-4 lint rules.
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; envelope + kind enum are load-bearing; per-kind body shapes are illustrative-and-flexible. Per CM §6.1 corrected pattern (2026-05-01), most kinds inline body with `wosTarget`/`wosShapeRef` documenting projection rather than $ref-composing absent WOS $defs.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for the polymorphic Studio PolicyObject

workspaceId.description: Workspace this PolicyObject belongs to. RECOMMENDED on every standalone PolicyObject document. MAY be omitted when the PolicyObject is serialized inside a collection wrapper (e.g., `{workspaceId: ws-X, policyObjects: [...]}`) where workspaceId is implicit from the wrapper. Stage-4 lint rule SHOULD reject standalone documents without workspaceId.

kind.description: Discriminator naming the PolicyObject kind. The `body` shape varies per kind (illustrative shapes documented inline; deeper validation via Stage-4 lint).

x-lm.intent: Polymorphism discriminator — load-bearing for routing to the right body shape and projection target

originClass.description: Where this PolicyObject came from. Every approved PolicyObject MUST carry exactly one originClass per authoring-provenance.md. Enum lives in wos-studio-common.schema.json #/$defs/OriginClass.

x-lm.intent: Origin classification — load-bearing for tier-S2 readiness and reviewer attestation requirements

citations.description: SourceCitation references grounding this PolicyObject. Per source-vault.md every approved PolicyObject MUST have at least one citation OR be backed by an Assumption.

mappingState.description: How this PolicyObject relates to the WOS substrate. Required on approved objects; optional on draft. Enum lives in wos-studio-common.schema.json #/$defs/MappingState.

x-lm.intent: Mapping disposition — load-bearing for compilation routing

extensionRecord.description: Optional inline ExtensionRecord (when mappingState = requiresSpecExtension). Authoritative copy lives on the StudioToWosMapping per studio-to-wos-mapping.md; this is a reviewer-readability denormalization at the PolicyObject site.

unmappedRationale.description: Optional inline rationale (when mappingState = unmappedButApproved). Authoritative copy lives on the StudioToWosMapping; this is a reviewer-readability denormalization.

body.description: Kind-specific body. Stage-3 accepts flexible body shape (additionalProperties: true) per kind; Stage-4 lint rules enforce per-kind required fields. See policy-object-model.md and binding-and-integration.md for the per-kind shape conventions. For DecisionRule with body.form='table' (DecisionTable), body.rows[] / body.hitPolicy / body.completenessRequirement project to parent kernel decisionTables[*] per Kernel §4.5.1 (lossless round-trip).

linkedPolicyObjectRefs.description: Cross-references to other PolicyObjects (e.g., AppealRight.linkedNoticeRef, Deadline.linkedAppealRightRef).

body.description: Deontic body. SHOULD carry `defeasible: boolean` for OASIS LegalRuleML interop; MAY carry `legalRuleML: {lrml:* JSON-LD terms}` for direct LegalRuleML serialization.
